where_to_eat.name: A Joy Restaurant
where_to_eat.description: A well-regarded restaurant in Taipei, popular enough that visitors plan their New Year's Eve dining around it.

where_to_eat.name: Raohe Night Market
where_to_eat.description: A vibrant night market offering street food and local cuisine, a must-visit destination for food lovers exploring Taipei's incredible food scene.

where_to_eat.name: Night Markets (General)
where_to_eat.description: Taipei's night markets are legendary among visitors, where you can experience amazing cuisine and local food culture that justifies traveling just for the food.

into_the_wild.name: Shifen Waterfall
into_the_wild.description: Known as the 'Little Niagara of Taiwan,' this magnificent waterfall in New Taipei City is just a 20-minute walk from the train station and offers stunning natural beauty.

gram_worthy_spots.name: Taipei 101
gram_worthy_spots.description: Taipei's iconic skyscraper is one of the most photogenic spots in the city, especially striking during dramatic weather conditions and night shots with cyberpunk aesthetics.

gram_worthy_spots.name: Jiufen
gram_worthy_spots.description: A beautiful hilly town with narrow lanes, cafés, sea views, and great vantage points - offering numerous photo opportunities of traditional architecture and scenic landscapes.

gram_worthy_spots.name: Xinyi District (Godzilla Building)
gram_worthy_spots.description: Features the distinctive 'Xinyi Godzilla' luxury apartment building with a unique architectural shape that makes for striking foreground shots in city photography.

off_the_beaten_path.name: Neighborhoods Beyond Travel Blogs
off_the_beaten_path.description: Taipei has many unexplored neighborhoods not featured in mainstream travel blogs that reward curious visitors with authentic local culture and hidden gems.

off_the_beaten_path.name: A-Mei Tea House (Jiufen)
off_the_beaten_path.description: While Jiufen itself can be touristy, exploring beyond the famous A-Mei Tea House reveals authentic cafés and local spots with genuine charm in this hillside town.
